title: JCP Midlife MOT Group Sessions Management Information, January 2023 to June 2025
body: "The Jobcentre Plus Midlife MOT is for Universal Credit claimants aged 50 plus to help them think about their future through voluntary group information sessions focused on work, wealth, and health.  The Midlife MOT sessions are held in jobcentres across England, Scotland and Wales.  Further information  The Jobcentre Plus Midlife MOT qualitative research report provides feedback from staff and claimants on the value of the Jobcentre Plus Midlife MOT and identifies suggestions for delivery improvements.  "
